metadata.description: Contoso's internal plugin catalog for SRE Agent — org-specific operational knowledge and internal API integrations contributed by specialist teams

plugins.name: aks-runbooks
plugins.description: Contoso-specific AKS troubleshooting runbooks and deployment tracking. Encodes the Kubernetes Platform Team's tribal knowledge: naming conventions, node pool strategy, PDB policies, upgrade cadence, and integrates with the internal deployment tracker to correlate incidents with recent deploys.

plugins.name: cost-capacity
plugins.description: Contoso FinOps policies, SKU approval matrix, and cost dashboard integration. Provides real-time team-level spend data, budget burn rates, and enforces Contoso's capacity governance (e.g., D-series VMs require VP approval, scale-out preferred over scale-up).

plugins.name: service-catalog
plugins.description: Contoso's internal service catalog (CMDB) integration. Maps services to owners, dependencies, and criticality tiers. Enables the agent to look up who owns a service, what depends on it, what SLA tier it's in, and who to escalate to — information that doesn't exist in Azure resource metadata.
